metadata.purpose: Track AI-assisted backend development progress, errors, and learning

common_errors.error: Module level import not at top of file
common_errors.solution: Move all imports to the top of settings.py before any code

solutions_applied: Used MCP servers (django-supabase-auth, djangorestframework-simplejwt) for best practices
Configured JWT authentication with token rotation and blacklist support
Set up proper CORS and CSRF protection for frontend integration
best_practices: Always use environment variables for sensitive data
Follow Django's class-based views for consistency
Use dj-database-url for flexible database configuration
Enable JWT token rotation and blacklist for security
Configure OpenAPI schema for API documentation

database.connection: Using dj-database-url with DATABASE_URL env var
migrations: Initial Django migrations ready to run

endpoints.description: Refresh access token using refresh token

error_patterns.lint_errors: Always place imports at module top before any code

resolutions_applied.import_ordering: Use: pathlib, os, datetime, third-party, django, local

completed_tasks: Created Backend_and_Database_Roadmap.md
Populated backend/requirements.txt with all dependencies
Configured settings.py with environment variables
Integrated dj-database-url for Supabase Postgres
Added DRF, CORS, django-filter, drf-spectacular
Configured SimpleJWT with rotation and blacklist
Created api/v1 structure with health endpoint
Added JWT auth endpoints (obtain, refresh, verify)
Wired OpenAPI schema and Swagger UI routes
Enhanced .env.example with complete configuration
Created backend/SETUP.md with setup instructions
Fixed lint errors in settings.py
Created accounts app with custom User model (email-based auth)
Implemented Role model with 7 role types and verification fields
Created 6 profile models (Patient, Doctor, Nurse, Pharmacist, LabTech, FacilityAdmin)
Built comprehensive serializers for all models
Implemented registration endpoint with role-based profile creation
Created whoami, role-switch, and profile management endpoints
Registered all models in Django admin with custom configurations
Applied migrations to Supabase database successfully
Configured AUTH_USER_MODEL in settings
